meta.title: Pick Me Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: How much pick-me energy do you have? Take this fun viral test to find out your pick-me level!

app.title: Pick Me Test
app.subtitle: How much pick-me energy do you have?
app.description: Answer 12 social scenarios to measure your pick-me energy. Are you confidently secure or a certified pick-me?

q1.text: Your friend group is picking a restaurant
q1.c: Go along but secretly want somewhere specific
q1.d: I don't care, you guys pick! I'm so easy-going!

q2.a: Thanks! I love this look too
q2.b: Oh really? I just threw this on
q2.c: This old thing? I look terrible today
q2.d: Omg nooo, YOU look way better than me!

q3.text: Your crush talks to someone else at a party
q3.b: Feel a bit jealous but keep cool
q3.d: Loudly announce how you're 'not like other people'

q4.d: 'I'm not like everyone else, I actually read books'

q5.b: Make sure you look your best angle
q5.c: Say 'ugh I look so ugly' while posing perfectly
q5.d: Post it saying 'I look terrible lol' fishing for compliments

q6.text: Your friend vents about their relationship
q6.c: Subtly compare to your own problems
q6.d: Make it about you: 'At least you HAVE someone...'

q7.c: Assume they might be laughing about you
q7.d: Try to join to prove you're fun too

q8.text: Your post gets fewer likes than usual
q8.d: Delete and repost at a 'better' time

q9.c: Congratulate but highlight your own achievements
q9.d: Make a post about how 'nobody notices MY hard work'

q10.text: You disagree with the group's opinion
q10.b: Stay quiet to keep the peace

q11.c: Write 'I'm not like other people on here'
q11.d: List all the ways you're 'low maintenance'

q12.d: Tell each side what they want to hear

secure.name: Main Character Secure
secure.desc: Zero pick-me energy! You're confident and secure in who you are. You don't need validation from others to feel good about yourself.

chill.name: Chill Vibes
chill.desc: Mostly secure with occasional people-pleasing moments. You're pretty self-aware and generally authentic, with just a few moments of seeking approval.

mild.name: Mild Pick Me
mild.desc: Some pick-me tendencies are emerging! You sometimes seek validation or compare yourself to others. Self-awareness is the first step to growth!

certified.name: Certified Pick Me
certified.desc: Definitely giving pick-me energy! You often seek approval and try to stand out by putting yourself down or being overly agreeable.

ultimate.name: Ultimate Pick Me
ultimate.desc: Maximum pick-me energy! People-pleasing has become an art form. You've turned seeking validation into a full-time activity!

share.title: Share Your Result
share.text: My Pick Me level is {score}%! I'm "{tier}" 🙋 Find out yours:
